records.summary: Pricing page listing all drop-in and membership options including a €29 resident trial, €25 single class, monthly recurring plans, and class packs. Gift cards are also available.
records.notes: Pricing is clear and well-structured with direct buy links, but there is no schedule, no studio address, no class style descriptions, and the page title/H1 do not reference Barcelona or yoga type for SEO.

records.summary: Schedule page with an embedded booking widget (Momence) plus a static image of the weekly timetable. Lists Bikram 90 and Vinyasa 60 as class types and includes booking rules.
records.notes: The live booking widget showed no classes on the sampled day and the main schedule relies on a static image with no alt text; pricing, address, and SEO signals like LocalBusiness schema are absent.

records.summary: A 200-hour Hot Hatha Vinyasa YTT in Barcelona running over 3 months on weekends, including a 3-day Costa Brava retreat, registered with Yoga Alliance. Pricing is shown and teacher bios are present, but upcoming dates are not yet published.
records.trainingName: 200h Hot Hatha Vinyasa Yoga Teacher Training
records.dates: Dates coming soon — email for inquiries
records.notes: Price and curriculum are visible near the top, but missing specific dates seriously hurts conversion; SEO is weakened by no visible title tag naming city and hours, likely no course schema, and reviews mention the studio rather than the training program specifically.

records.pageName: One Day Yoga Retreat in Spain – Hot Yoga Barcelona
records.summary: A one-day yoga retreat on April 18, 2026, set in the hills near Parc del Montnegre i el Corredor, about one hour from Barcelona. The day includes Hatha Vinyasa yoga, forest bathing, myofascial release, yoga nidra, and a vegetarian lunch by the pool.
records.retreatName: One Day Yoga Retreat in Spain
records.where: Near Parc del Montnegre i el Corredor, approximately 1 hour from Barcelona, Spain (accessible via train to Arenys de Mar with pick-up transfer)
records.when: April 18, 2026 (currently sold out – waiting list open)
records.price: Not stated on the page; early bird mentioned but no figure given
includes: 15-minute pick-up transfer from Arenys de Mar (if needed)
records.notes: The date and schedule are clear and near the top, but the price is completely missing from the page, which is a significant conversion barrier, and the venue is described by park name only with no named venue or address.
